ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data collection */,
  "precip" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wet_temp" REAL /* Wet bulb temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dry_temp" REAL /* Dry bulb temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_dir" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees (0-360) */,
  "dewpoint" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "stn_pressure" REAL /* Station pressure in hPa */,
  "sea_pressure" REAL /* Sea-level pressure in hPa */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality report */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data interval */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES data_intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("data_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES weather_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was established */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the station record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the station record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality report */,
  "quality_report" TEXT /* Summary of the data quality */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the data quality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quality report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quality report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Station A, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for external data sources */,
  "authentication_key" TEXT /* Authentication key for external data sources */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was last accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the interval (e.g., Hourly, Daily) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interval was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interval was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "precip" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wet_temp" REAL /* Wet bulb temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dry_temp" REAL /* Dry bulb temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_dir" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees (0-360) */,
  "dewpoint" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "stn_pressure" REAL /* Station pressure in hPa */,
  "sea_pressure" REAL /* Sea-level pressure in hPa */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality report */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data interval */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the historical data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES weather_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES data_intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("data_quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "real_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "precip" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wet_temp" REAL /* Wet bulb temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dry_temp" REAL /* Dry bulb temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_dir" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees (0-360) */,
  "dewpoint" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "stn_pressure" REAL /* Station pressure in hPa */,
  "sea_pressure" REAL /* Sea-level pressure in hPa */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality report */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data interval */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the real-time data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the real-time data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the real-time data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("real_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("data_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES weather_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES data_intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., thunderstorm, high wind) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message or description of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of the analysis (e.g., trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "visualization_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was uploaded */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
